response.justification: Bogdan has solid multi-stack engineering breadth and meets the raw years-of-experience floor, but the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership with recognized expertise and demonstrated AI platform products — his AI exposure is recent (roughly one year at re:cinq), no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no track record of advising strategic customers or influencing large technical organizations on AI adoption.
strengths: Roughly 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals a genuine pivot toward the space
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform shows entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated depth or recognized expertise in AI/ML — current AI involvement is shallow and very recent
No evidence of director-level technical leadership, executive advising, or influencing large engineering organizations
Education is a BS only with no advanced AI-related degree, and no compensating publication or conference presence in AI

key_factors.factor: Years of engineering experience meets minimum
